groupDefinition.name: Electron Desktop Mode
groupDefinition.description: Native OS integration and desktop-specific orchestration features for the standalone application.

items.title: Electron Main Process Architecture
items.description: Establish Electron main process per spec [§6.1](system-specification.md#61-electron-desktop-mode)
details: Created `electron/main.ts`: `BrowserWindow` with mandatory security config (`contextIsolation: true`, `nodeIntegration: false`, `sandbox: true`).
Adopted `HashLocationStrategy` to resolve `file://` protocol routing incompatibility.

items.title: Setup Page Separation
items.description: Separate the Setup page into Web (`/setup-web`) and Electron (`/setup-electron`) versions via route guards.

items.title: Electron IPC Transport Layer (`IpcTransportService`)
details: Electron main process forwards calls to DAP Server via WebSocket relay

items.title: Electron Local File System Access
items.description: Implement local file reading per spec [§6.1](system-specification.md#61-electron-desktop-mode)
details: Read file tree and file contents via IPC calling Node.js `fs` API
items.notes: Architecture relies on generic DAP source requests instead of direct fs access.
